---
title: "General_alogorithm"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{General_alogorithm}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup, echo=F}
library(ManifoldDestiny)
```

# Phase #1: Initiating the voter database

# Phase #2: Manifold Destiny

# Phase #3: Phantom-voters

# Phase #4: Updating the voter databse
